subject: Feature install odl-netconf-clustered-topology
commit_message:
Feature install odl-netconf-clustered-topology

Install the odl-netconf-clustered-topology feature for clustered environments.

Change-Id: Ic369fcbb962c9494dd6e165e38829cc55915689c
Issue-ID: APPC-1242
Signed-off-by: Aaron Hay <aaron.hay@att.com>

Is there a different netconf feature that we should be installing instead? Or are you saying none are needed?

Patch Set 2:

odl-netconf-topology or odl-clustered-netconf-topology are all you need for netconf. It will pull in all of what is needed.
Change has been successfully merged by Alexis de Talhouët
